title: Inventory Sorting Dark Theme
description: A slight change in the texture of the inventory sorting button for the Inventory Sorting mod. The button is made in the style of Unique Dark.
body:
# Inventory Sorting Dark Theme

A small resource pack that updates the inventory sort button and also adapts it to the [Unique Dark](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/unique-dark) resource pack.

![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/616dbe072d168ac52f9969e13936616bb54ed73d.png)

Original mod - [Inventory Sorting](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-sorting)
